hero.h1: Web Agency & Digital Marketing in {{city}} — MouDev

home.h2: Website Creation in {{city}} – Digital Marketing Agency in Morocco
home.p1: Looking for a digital marketing agency in {{city}} and Morocco specializing in website creation, SEO and Google Ads management to strengthen your online presence? Request your free quote today.
home.p2: MouDev is your digital partner for creating a professional website in {{city}}, whether it's a showcase, e-commerce or custom site. With our expertise in webdesign and visual identity, we ensure an effective digital strategy to generate qualified traffic and lasting conversions.
home.p3: Through our mastery of Google Ads in {{city}}, we maximize your Google visibility and your positioning on search engines. Our team supports your digital transformation from A to Z: web development, web maintenance and integration of customized solutions — for businesses in {{city}} and across Morocco.

packs.h2: Our packages to build your website

web.title: Website Creation & Webdesign
web.desc: Showcase, catalogue, e-commerce and portal sites. From careful webdesign to web maintenance, we manage your online presence from A to Z.

seo.title: Search Engine Optimization
seo.desc: Improve your Google visibility and generate sustainable organic traffic with an SEO strategy tailored to your industry.

ads.title: Google Ads
ads.desc: Entrust us with your Google Ads campaigns to maximize your return on investment through a precise and measurable digital strategy.

process.subheading: A reliable and transparent approach to design your website with speed and efficiency.

steps.title: Analysis & Discovery
steps.desc: We start by understanding your specific needs, business objectives and target audience. This phase includes an in-depth analysis of your industry and competitors.

steps.title: Design & Conception
steps.desc: Creation of visual mockups that reflect your brand identity and offer an optimal user experience. You validate every aspect before the development phase.

steps.title: Development
steps.desc: Our developers transform mockups into code, integrating all required features and ensuring perfect compatibility across all devices.

steps.title: Testing & Optimization
steps.desc: Rigorous verification of all aspects of the site, from performance to user experience. Optimization for SEO and page loading speed.

steps.title: Launch
steps.desc: Going live after final validation. We configure hosting, security certificates and ensure a smooth transition for your new website.

steps.title: Support & Evolution
steps.desc: We remain at your side after launch with technical support and advice for the evolution of your site according to your needs and market trends.

items.q: How much does website creation cost in {{city}}?
items.a: The price depends on the type and complexity of the project. Our packages start from a simple showcase site to complete e-commerce platforms. Contact us to receive a personalized and free quote according to your needs.

items.q: How long does it take to deliver a website?
items.a: Generally, a showcase site is delivered in 1 to 2 weeks, a catalogue site in 2 to 3 weeks, and an e-commerce in 3 to 5 weeks. The deadline depends on the availability of content (texts, images, logo) that you provide us.

items.q: Will my site be optimized for Google (SEO)?
items.a: Yes, all our sites are delivered with basic SEO optimization: title and meta description tags, heading structure (H1/H2/H3), clean URLs, optimized images and responsive site. We also offer advanced SEO services to improve your long-term ranking.

items.q: Can I modify my site's content myself after delivery?
items.a: Absolutely. All our sites are delivered with an intuitive administration interface that allows you to modify texts, images, products and pages without any technical knowledge. A hands-on training session is included in all our packages.

items.q: Do you offer maintenance and support services?
items.a: Yes, we provide technical support after delivery. You can contact us at any time via WhatsApp or phone for any modification request or technical issue. Monthly maintenance contracts are also available.

Yes, all our sites are 100% responsive. They automatically adapt to smartphones, tablets and computers. This is an essential requirement for SEO and user experience, and it is included in all our packages.

items.q: Do you work with clients outside {{city}}?
items.a: Yes, we work with clients throughout Morocco (Rabat, Marrakech, Fes, Tanger, Agadir...) and internationally. All project management is done remotely via WhatsApp, email and video calls.

items.q: What is included in the hosting?
items.a: The hosting included in our packages includes: high-performance SSD storage, SSL certificate (HTTPS), professional emails, regular backups and domain name for the first year. It is reliable hosting with 99.9% uptime.
